title: UW-Madison Google Workspace  - Share Files and Folders in Google Drive
body: Learn more: Share files from Google Drive Share folders in Google Drive Note If a user has FERPA privacy flag on their account, their personal information will be omitted from the UW-Madison Google Workspace contact list. Files can be shared with external collaborators (non UW-Madison Google accounts). Because external Google users are not listed in the UW-Madison directory, you'll need to enter their complete email address (ex: sam@inc.com) when sharing files. See Also UW-Madison Google Workspace -  UW-Madison Google Workspace Accounts vs. Personal Google Accounts UW-Madison Google Workspace  - Benefits of Use UW-Madison Google Workspace - FAQ UW-Madison Google Workspace  - Uploading Files to Google Drive
